productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Blue Bing Black Backpack
description: Talk about style and space rolled into one, and there's no better Sports bag you can find than this one from nike. Neatly designed with lots of organizer space, this colourful bag makes for a great everyday wear to school or college.Height: 17.7"Width: 12.6"Depth: 7.9"Capacity: 28 L Made of polyester with a nylon and polyester lining for durability and easy cleaning Branded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bag One main copiously spaced zippered compartment Printed facade on the outside Utility pocket on the front with mesh pouch Swoosh tab appliqued on the utility pocket Synthetic haul loop for handling ease Wide, adjustable handles and padded back for carrying ease and to protect the shoulders and back from injuries CareHand washClean with a damp cloth when necessaryDo not dry clean or machine washDo not bleachDo not tumble dryDo not wringLine dryDo not iron
